channel.title: Other on Galaxy of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Other on Galaxy of Thoughts

item.title: Strangers Thoughts | Poem
item.description: A stranger in my mind, a repulsive thought of guilty pleasure. Who is this that is not able to think right, think straight. Excuse me, we might need a straight jacket. The images that are flashing do not seem to be conjured out of the blues. Deep from the interludes of my cranium they seem to sprout out of nothingness of the black hole. I have seen this before, reminiscing deja vu or confusion of being able to do martial art styles like kung fu.

item.title: Decision Making From Choices
item.description: You do not need to know what you want all the time, knowing what you do not want is equally a strong motivation factor that should not be ignored. Probably contrary to what most have been told, I feel this should be emphasized. Our human body adapts accepting new things, food, experiences and environments. Contrarily, when introduced to things it doesn’t like the body reacts in worse cases we end up with severe allergic breakouts.
